jurisdictions.name: India
jurisdictions.non_compete_enforceability: Generally unenforceable post-employment under Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act (restraint of trade). Limited enforceability during employment.
jurisdictions.dispute_resolution: Courts, Arbitration (Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996), Consumer Forums, Lok Adalats, NCLT (for company disputes)
important_notes: NDA enforcement varies by specificity and reasonableness
Specific performance is court's discretion under Specific Relief Act

jurisdictions.name: United States
employment_laws: Title VII of the Civil Rights Act
jurisdictions.non_compete_enforceability: Varies significantly by state. California bans most non-competes. Other states allow them if reasonable in scope, duration, and geography.
jurisdictions.dispute_resolution: Federal and State Courts, Arbitration (AAA, JAMS), Mediation

jurisdictions.name: United Kingdom
key_contract_laws: Supply of Goods and Services Act 1982
jurisdictions.non_compete_enforceability: Enforceable if reasonable in scope, duration, and geography. Must protect legitimate business interests. Typical maximum 6-12 months.
jurisdictions.dispute_resolution: Courts, Employment Tribunals, Arbitration, ACAS Conciliation
important_notes: Post-Brexit, EU law no longer directly applies

jurisdictions.name: European Union
jurisdictions.legal_system: Civil Law (most member states) with EU directives
key_contract_laws: Rome I Regulation (applicable law for contracts)
employment_laws: National employment laws of member states
jurisdictions.non_compete_enforceability: Varies by member state. Generally enforceable if reasonable, with compensation during restriction period required in many countries.
jurisdictions.dispute_resolution: National Courts, EU Court of Justice, Arbitration
important_notes: Contract law primarily national, not EU-wide

jurisdictions.name: General / International
key_contract_laws: UNIDROIT Principles of International Commercial Contracts
United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG)
UNCITRAL Model Law on International Commercial Arbitration
jurisdictions.non_compete_enforceability: Depends on the governing law chosen in the contract and the jurisdiction where enforcement is sought.
jurisdictions.dispute_resolution: International Arbitration (ICC, LCIA, SIAC, HKIAC), National Courts
important_notes: Choice of governing law is critical
Arbitration clauses recommended for cross-border contracts
Language and currency should be specified
